'''''Indiko''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class Star Destroyer]] in the service of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

==History==
The ''Indiko'' was active on the frontlines of the war mere weeks before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. The only thing known about it is the fact that it, alongside the Star Destroyer ''[[Darkk]]'', were sent to collect [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] after he defended Emperor [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] personal yacht from a failed assault launched by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] traitor [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]].
